title: Run goal-loop succeeds against a local OpenAI-compatible stub
description: Black-box smoke for `armature run --done-when` using a local provider stub and a trivially passing command criterion.
input: Start a localhost OpenAI-compatible stub, run `armature run "say hello" --provider local --done-when "exit 0: true" --max-turns 1`, and verify the goal-loop passes on the first iteration while capturing the request payload.
